intended_use: EyeArt is indicated for use by healthcare providers to automatically detect more than mild diabetic retinopathy and vision-threatening diabetic retinopathy (severe non-proliferative diabetic retinopat
intended_use_full: EyeArt is indicated for use by healthcare providers to automatically detect more than mild diabetic retinopathy and vision-threatening diabetic retinopathy (severe non-proliferative diabetic retinopathy or proliferative diabetic retinopathy and/or diabetic macular edema) in eyes of adults diagnosed with diabetes who have not been previously diagnosed with more than mild diabetic retinopathy. EyeArt is indicated for use with Canon CR-2 AF and Canon CR-2 Plus AF cameras in both primary care and eye care settings.
target_condition: More than mild diabetic retinopathy and vision-threatening diabetic retinopathy in adults with diabetes
ground_truth: Reference standard determined by experienced and certified graders at the Fundus Photography Reading Center (FPRC) using the Early Treatment for Diabetic Retinopathy Study (ETDRS) severity scale on dilated 4-wide field stereo fundus imaging
other_metrics: Imageability: 96.5% - 98.6% across cohorts. Positive Likelihood Ratio: 5.812 - 41.0. Negative Likelihood Ratio: 0.0 - 0.12. Intra-operator overall agreement (repeatability): 93.5% - 93.9% for mtmDR, 96.8% - 98.9% for vtDR. Inter-operator overall agreement (reproducibility): 90.3% for mtmDR, 96.8% for vtDR.
